title: Xwholesome Xcrystalline Croatian Wild Mushroom Stir-fry
description: A resinous and crumbly crowd-pleasing Croatian dish featuring wild mushrooms that are caramelized for a sweet, savory taste. Diabetic-friendly.

ingredients.name: Diabetic-Friendly Sweetener (agave nectar or Stevia, optional)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions and minced garlic to the pot and sauté until translucent.
Fold in the sliced Portobello mushrooms. Cook for about 3 minutes or until they start to brown slightly.
Crush the vegetable stock cube into small pieces and add it to the mushroom mixture.
Stir frequently, reduce heat to low, cover the Dutch oven, and simmer gently for about 10 minutes.
Remove from heat and check seasoning. If desired, add fresh herbs or a bit of diabetic-friendly sweetener for extra depth of flavor.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
